def negative_python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_list_append_without_generator_stream():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_list_append_without_generator_stream"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag large intermediate lists built only to feed another iterator-compatible consumer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
